arts.ttl: Better scoring rate than Haaland - Jhon Durán's form validating Aston Villa transfer decision
arts.sum: Jhon Durán continued his remarkable goal scoring form for Aston Villa this season with another goal from the bench in their 3-1 win over Wolves. Ole Gunnar...

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sweats on Man Utd injury return in time for Aston Villa clash
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag admits left-back and England international Luke Shaw is in a race against time to be fit enough to return before the October international break - and so a date with Aston Villa. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.

arts.ttl: I was Aston Villa's promotion hero but I never saw this stunning rise coming
arts.sum: Aston Villa promotion hero Albert Adomah admits he couldn't have foreseen his old side's rise into the Champions League materialising so quickly after leaving the club upon their return to the Premier League in 2019. Adomah, who has since returned to the West Midlands and is playing for League Two promotion chasers Walsall, recorded 11 assists under Roberto Di Matteo and Steve Bruce in Villa's first season in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery has an unseen quality which sets him apart from Aston Villa rivals
arts.sum: Former Villa coach Roy Keane, a pundit for Sky Sports, spoke for many when he said on air about the Leandro Trossard dismissal for two cautions: "Wouldn't it be good if a manager came out after the game and said, 'Do you know what, he was a bit silly and it was a yellow card'. This isn't to say referees will always be blameless and mistakes won't be made by those out in the middle or by those drawing lines on VAR duty, yet Emery at Villa never seems to feel a need to dig out the officials post match, irrespective of how events have played out.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa could be lining up move to sign €28m Liverpool man
arts.sum: With Aston Villa improving all the time under Unai Emery’s direction, it’s important that the Midlands-based side keep riding that crest of a wave. Their first Champions League (European Cup) campaign since 1983 started with a bang as Villa took Young Boys apart in Bern, and their next assignment in the competition sees them paired […] The post Aston Villa could be lining up move to sign €28m Liverpool man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery will make Aston Villa demand in order to obliterate Premier League order
arts.sum: With the dust having settled, Villa have begun the new term in excellent style, winning five of their six matches in all competitions and aiming for a sixth against Wycombe Wanderers tonight. Unai Emery remains firmly of the belief that Aston Villa cannot only match their elite Premier League rivals for another season, but continue to grow and eclipse them.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery could utilise Aston Villa wildcards to uncover hidden depth
arts.sum: The likes of Emi Martinez, Ezri Konsa, Pau Torres and Ollie Watkins will be certainly looking forward to next Wednesday night, when the anthem is blared around Villa Park and Bayern Munich await. Still, one or two caught the eye at Fleetwood Town recently in front of the watching Emery - who was admittedly at the game to watch Barkley, Ramsey and Buendia primarily - and one or two more have been hanging around the first-team in training and have been involved in match-day squads more recently.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville attacks Premier League after threat of barring Aston Villa from Europe
arts.sum: Gary Neville has accused the Premier League of behaving like 'bullies' in the face of a Football Governance Bill, which would see the establishment of an independent football regulator, under the new Labour government. The Premier League has hit back at Neville's accusations of acting like a 'bully', stating they are in ongoing discussions with the new government regarding the football regulator.

arts.ttl: Why Villa boss Emery is much more than a great tactician
arts.sum: There is a story from Unai Emery’s time at Almeria that seems so out of character that the initial assumption is that it cannot be true. This was his first ever fixture as a top-flight manager, a dauting trip to Deportivo La Coruna on the opening weekend.

arts.ttl: Pau Torres' confident Aston Villa warning should make Man City and Arsenal uneasy
arts.sum: Centre half Torres has been a revelation for Villa since joining the club from Villarreal - where he'd previously worked and won the Europa League under Emery - last summer and he proved to be a big miss at the heart of defence when he suffered injury issues in the winter. Torres also sees no reason why this new look Villa side, buoyed by the additions of Amadou Onana, Ian Maatsen, Ross Barkley and Jaden Philogene and set to welcome back Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara from long-term injuries, cannot go one better than their fourth placed finish last season.
